checks.name: adapter_produces_surfaces
checks.detail: deriveProjection returns surfaces[] array with 5 active surfaces for BlueEdge data: DELIVERY_FRAGILITY, OPERATIONAL_TOPOLOGY, PROPAGATION_RISK, QUALIFICATION_EXPOSURE, INTEGRATION_EXPOSURE

checks.name: surfaces_sorted_by_severity
checks.detail: surfaces[] sorted by SEVERITY_ORDER — HIGH first (Delivery Fragility), then ELEVATED (Topology, Propagation), then MODERATE (Qualification), then LOW (Integration)

checks.name: each_surface_has_required_fields
checks.detail: All surfaces contain: surface_id, surface_name, severity, operational_summary, consequence, evidence_density, affected_domains, constituents, trace_sources

checks.name: coordination_saturation_absent_correctly
checks.detail: COORDINATION_SATURATION surface returns null for BlueEdge — no structural_enrichment.centrality data available. No fake surface generated

checks.name: multi_source_synthesis
checks.detail: Each surface cross-references 2-7 PI Core data sources. No surface is a single-source pass-through

checks.name: orchestration_backward_compat

checks.name: qualification_decomposition_preserved
checks.detail: Three qualification axes (structural_richness, governance_depth, reconciliation_authority) and guidance array preserved — QualificationContextStrip renders unchanged

checks.name: renderer_consumes_surfaces
